channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: A curated photo collection highlighting Sissy Spacek’s career and film roles during the 1980s
item.description: The article presents a curated collection of photographs featuring American actress and singer Sissy Spacek during the 1980s, a defining decade in her long and successful career. Spacek, born in 1949,...

item.title: Mohamed Esa wins Cape Town Marathon in record-breaking African marathon performance
item.description: Ethiopian marathon runner Mohamed Esa delivered a standout performance at the Sanlam Cape Town Marathon on Sunday, winning the race in a record-breaking time of 2:04:55. His achievement not only secur...

item.title: Chadema assigns Godbless Lema to strengthen party operations in Dodoma, Singida and Morogoro
item.description: Opposition party Chadema has officially appointed former Arusha Urban Member of Parliament, Mr Godbless Lema, to oversee efforts aimed at reviving and strengthening the party in Tanzania’s Central Zon...

item.title: Jack Avery addresses criminal allegations against former partner in alleged murder-for-hire case
item.description: Former Why Don’t We member Jack Avery has publicly responded after his former partner, social media influencer Gabbie Gonzalez, was charged in California in connection with an alleged murder-for-hire ...

item.title: Philippine Military Academy admits 367 new cadets for PMA Class 2030
item.description: The Philippine Military Academy (PMA) formally welcomed 367 new cadets who will compose the PMA Class of 2030 during oath-taking and reception rites held at Borromeo Field in Fort General Gregorio H. ...

item.title: Gabriel Pidomson clinches ADC governorship ticket after Rivers State primary election
item.description: Former Secretary to the Rivers State Government, Gabriel Pidomson, has emerged as the governorship candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC) after a keenly contested primary election in River...

item.title: The 1959 Chevrolet El Camino and Its Role in Mid-Century American Automotive Design
item.description: The article examines the 1959 Chevrolet El Camino as an iconic example of late-1950s American automotive design, highlighting its blend of utility and style during a period of strong industrial optimi...

item.title: Ro Khanna suggests Trump is putting JD Vance in politically difficult positions
item.description: Rep. Ro Khanna, a Democratic congressman, raised concerns during a recent NBC News appearance that former President Donald Trump may be deliberately placing Vice President JD Vance in politically risk...

item.title: Caroline Bullock criticises rising prices and declining service standards in British restaurants and pubs
item.description: Daily Mail columnist Caroline Bullock argues that many struggling restaurants and pubs in Britain are partly responsible for their own financial difficulties because of poor customer service, inflated...

item.title: Serengeti Boys reach AFCON U17 semi-finals after strong youth campaign
item.description: Tanzania’s Under-17 national football team, the Serengeti Boys, has made a major breakthrough by reaching the semi-finals of the Africa Cup of Nations U17 tournament. This achievement is being seen as...

item.title: Rescue teams recover stranded dog from steep cliff in Hermanus
item.description: Emergency responders in Hermanus successfully carried out a coordinated rescue operation to save a mixed-breed male dog that had become stranded on a near-vertical cliff face at Dreunkrans. The animal...

item.title: U.S. and Iran move closer to framework agreement as nuclear and regional issues remain unresolved
item.description: The United States and Iran are reported to be closer than ever to reaching a potential framework agreement aimed at de-escalating tensions in the Middle East and addressing disruptions to global energ...

item.title: OTR calls for stronger governance to improve performance of state-owned enterprises
item.description: The Office of the Treasury Registrar (OTR) in Tanzania has stressed that strong governance systems, accountability, and results-driven leadership are essential for improving the performance of public ...

item.title: Alberta government advances contentious referendum proposal on potential separation from Canada amid political division
item.description: The political situation in Alberta has intensified as Premier Danielle Smith’s government moves towards a controversial referendum process regarding the province’s future within Canada. The proposed q...

item.title: Martin Sheen Endorses Chris Pappas in Competitive New Hampshire Senate Race
item.description: Actor Martin Sheen, widely recognized for portraying fictional President Josiah Bartlet on the television series 'The West Wing,' has endorsed Democratic candidate Chris Pappas in New Hampshire’s clos...

item.title: Scottie Thompson keeps humble attitude despite strong performance in PBA semifinals
item.description: Barangay Ginebra star Scottie Thompson once again showed humility after delivering an impressive performance during the PBA Season 50 Commissioner’s Cup semifinals. The report highlighted how Thompson...

item.title: Good Charlotte confirm 2026 UK and European headline tour with Yellowcard support
item.description: Good Charlotte have announced a major UK and European tour scheduled for November 2026, marking their return to UK stages for the first time since 2019. The pop-punk band from Maryland will be joined ...

item.title: IMD issues yellow alert as dust storm and heatwave conditions expected in Delhi-NCR
item.description: The India Meteorological Department (IMD) has issued a yellow alert for Delhi-NCR, warning of heatwave conditions combined with strong surface winds and an incoming dust storm expected within the next...

item.title: Los Angeles voters to decide City Council races in eight districts, including two open seats
item.description: Los Angeles voters are set to participate in the June 2 primary election, casting ballots in eight of the city’s 15 City Council districts, including two races for open seats due to term limits. The m...

item.title: Secret Service fatally shoots armed suspect following gunfire incident near White House checkpoint
item.description: A man was fatally shot by U.S. Secret Service agents on Saturday after he opened fire with a handgun near a security checkpoint close to the White House in Washington, D.C. According to an official st...
